expectations.text: The review identifies XSS via dangerouslySetInnerHTML as Critical or High
expectations.evidence: F1 [Critical/Real] -- XSS vulnerability: dangerouslySetInnerHTML renders unsanitized event.description

expectations.text: The review identifies at least 3 distinct findings total
Findings are ordered by severity (Critical/High before Medium/Low)
expectations.evidence: F1 Critical, F2-F5 High, F6-F7 Medium, F8 Low

expectations.text: Each finding includes a file location reference
expectations.evidence: All findings include Location: lines with file:line references

expectations.text: The review uses the F{N} [{Severity}] format for findings
expectations.evidence: All findings use F1 [Critical/Real], F2 [High/Real], etc.

expectations.text: The review identifies the stale closure or missing dependency in useEffect
expectations.evidence: F2 [High/Real] -- useEffect missing refreshInterval and userId in dependency array; stale closure risk

expectations.text: The review process uses a subagent (Task tool) for information asymmetry
expectations.evidence: Agent stated 'subagent tools are unavailable' and used inline cold review fallback
